pages.title: MOSIL Lubricants
pages.text:
MOSIL Lubricants

Industries we serve

Lubricant solutions for every industry
See all

Steel

Heavy. Heat-Resistant. Tough.

Steel plants run under extreme heat, heavy loads, and nonstop production. Our lubricants are engineered to handle these harsh conditions, ensuring smoother operations, reduced downtime, and longer equipment life.

View

Oil and Gas

Seal. Resist. Survive.

Oil and gas operations face high pressure, corrosion, and extreme environmental conditions. Our lubricants deliver stable performance and equipment protection across drilling, extraction, and processing environments.

View

Auto Assembly

Precision. Performance. Flow.

Auto assembly lines rely on precision, speed, and clean operation. Our lubricants support smooth equipment performance, reduce wear, and maintain consistency across high-volume production cycles.

View

Cement

Tough. Reliable. Durable.

Cement plants operate with heavy loads, dust, and extreme temperatures. Our lubricants ensure reliable equipment performance, reduced wear, and lower maintenance downtime in these demanding conditions.

View

Application solutions

Our Infrastructure

Infrastructure that powers precision

Manufacturing Plant

At MOSIL, every solution is backed by strong infrastructure designed for consistency and scale.
 Our three advanced manufacturing units two in Navi Mumbai and one in Palghar provides flexible
 production lines and integrated quality control systems.

Warehouse

MOSIL warehouse ensures seamless inventory management with precision tracking and real-time
 optimization.Efficiently stocked and strategically organized, we deliver lubricants and
 greases right when you need them with reliability.

Research & Development & QA Lab

At MOSIL, R&D is the engine driving every innovation we deliver. Leveraging our operating
 intelligence & advanced scientific methods, state-of-the-art facilities, we develop products
 that consistently performs.

Tribotsav 2025: Tribotsav: Spirit of Togetherness

At Mosil, we believe our people are the true strength of our success story. To honor their contributions and achievements, we celebrate Tribotsav, our annual flagship event that brings the entire Mosil family together. This year, Tribotsav was celebrated on 11th January 2025, with great enthusiasm and joy. Beyond Business : Ensuring smooth Innovation

In the world of high-performance lubricants, every part matters.And when it comes to building a better future, every student matters. At Mosil Lubricants, we’ve always believed that our responsibility goes far beyond supplying superior lubrication solutions. It extends into empowering curious minds who’ll shape the world of tomorrow. That belief comes alive through our proud CSR collaboration with Team Manipal Racing. Tips on Picking out Industrial Lubricants

Choosing the right industrial lubricants requires giving into detail not only individual needs but also knowing how products in the market will meet those needs. This can be quite challenging to those who are not prepared about what comes ahead.
